name: Block Command Injection Attempts
objective: Detect and block HTTP request patterns associated with shell metacharacter abuse, command substitution, and direct operating system command execution attempts
risk_mitigated: Command injection that could let an attacker execute shell commands through vulnerable application parameters, resulting in remote code execution, data loss, or host compromise
potential_side_effects: May block legitimate tooling that intentionally passes shell-like syntax, CI task definitions, or support workflows containing command snippets. Validate carefully on developer-focused endpoints.
tuning_notes: Exclude narrowly scoped endpoints that intentionally accept shell syntax. If false positives appear, reduce generic metacharacter checks on the affected path before weakening explicit OS-command keyword matches.
deployment_notes: Deploy in log mode for at least 48 hours on existing applications. Review hits on task runners, diagnostics endpoints, and support tooling before enabling block mode broadly.
monitoring_notes: Alert on repeat blocks per source IP and correlate with application logs for failed command execution or template injection attempts. Sudden bursts usually indicate automated scanner activity.
cloudflare_expression: (http.request.uri.query contains ";" or http.request.uri.query contains "&&" or http.request.uri.query contains "||" or http.request.uri.query contains "`" or http.request.uri.query contains "$(" or http.request.uri.query contains "/bin/sh" or http.request.uri.query contains "cmd.exe" or http.request.uri.query contains "powershell" or http.request.body contains ";" or http.request.body contains "&&" or http.request.body contains "||" or http.request.body contains "`" or http.request.body contains "$(" or http.request.body contains "/bin/sh" or http.request.body contains "cmd.exe" or http.request.body contains "powershell")
log_only_expression: (http.request.uri.query contains "$(" or http.request.uri.query contains "`" or http.request.body contains "$(" or http.request.body contains "`")
